infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MedRoute uses your location to find nearby hospitals and emergency services.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MedRoute uses the microphone so you can describe symptoms by voice.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: MedRoute saves blood-donation camps to your calendar when you opt in.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: MedRoute saves blood-donation camps to your calendar when you opt in.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: MedRoute saves blood-donation camps to your calendar when you opt in.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MedRoute uses Photos to set a profile picture you choose.
